name: Summer Vegetable Bowl
recipeInstructions:
Preparation and cooking: 1 hour
This is a beautifully colorful dish.
1. In a 6-quart Dutch oven over medium heat, fry the bacon until crisp. Drain on paper towels.
2. Add the onions and green pepper to the drippings in the Dutch oven. Cook until golden brown.
3. Add hot water and the remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Add the zucchini and celery. Cover and cook until all vegetables are tender, about 8 to 10 more minutes.
5. Arrange the vegetables on a large platter or in a shallow bowl. Crumble the bacon over the top and sprinkle with salt. Arrange the tomato wedges on top.
